description:
Remove Images from Post List Views and Display Text Excerpts Only

Modify the post list display to exclude images from post content and show only a text preview for each post entry.

Requirements:
- Strip all images from post content when rendering in list views
- Display a text-only excerpt from each post (no image tags or embedded media)
- Determine appropriate excerpt length (e.g., 150-200 characters or first paragraph)
- Add ellipsis or "Read more" indicator if text is truncated
- Ensure images still display normally in individual post detail views
- Handle edge cases: posts with only images, posts with no text content
- Maintain proper text formatting while removing image elements
- Verify changes apply to all post list contexts (home page, category pages, search results, archive views)
title: Remove Images from Post List Views, Show Text Excerpts
